Empowering Uganda's Next Generation

UPSHIFT YOUTH EMPOWERMENT INITIATIVE

We empower young people across Uganda through Quality education, mentorship, and creative innovation.

Scroll Down
The future of Uganda is in the hands of its youth — and we exist to ensure those hands are capable, confident, and ready.

Upshift Youth Empowerment Initiative

Our programs

Through a comprehensive, community-driven approach to health, education, employment, and leadership empowerment, USYEI is placing rural marginalized children and youth on a pathway out of poverty—from cradle to career.

Our Mission

Empowering Youth
to Take Action

To empower young people across Uganda with innovative skills, entrepreneurial thinking, and transformative experiences that enable them to solve community challenges and build sustainable futures.

  • Skills development & hands-on learning
  • Entrepreneurship & innovation training
  • Community-centered problem solving
  • Mentorship & leadership pathways
Our Vision

A Uganda Where Every
Young Person Thrives

A Uganda where every young person — regardless of background or circumstance — has the confidence, capability, and platform to contribute meaningfully to society and shape their own destiny.

  • Inclusive opportunity for all youth
  • Resilient, self-reliant communities
  • Youth-led social & economic change
  • Sustained generational impact
Get Involved

How You Can Help

Every contribution, big or small, transforms a young life in Uganda.

Sponsor a Child

Support a specific child's journey through school, nutrition, and mentorship with a monthly sponsorship.

Get Started →

Become a Corporate Supporter

We partner with organisations that share our passion — results have been fantastic for all involved.

Volunteer with USYEI

There are many opportunities to get involved directly — from teaching and mentoring to event support.
